name: Backlog: Stale % & Oldest Issue
query:
WITH latest_snapshot AS (
    SELECT MAX(v_facts.full_date) AS max_date
    FROM metrics.v_facts
    WHERE v_facts.calc_code IN ('backlog_stale_pct', 'backlog_oldest_days')
      [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
      [[AND {{project_key}}]]
      [[AND {{date_range}}]]
)
SELECT
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'backlog_stale_pct' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 1) AS stale_pct,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'backlog_oldest_days' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END)::integer AS oldest_days
FROM metrics.v_facts
JOIN latest_snapshot ls ON v_facts.full_date = ls.max_date
WHERE v_facts.calc_code IN ('backlog_stale_pct', 'backlog_oldest_days')
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
